requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Fiji PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——斐济光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——斐濟光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Fiji's standards administration is handled through the Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS), while project owners and EFL commonly rely on IEC-aligned technical evidence for grid-connected electrical equipment. For PV inverters, the relevant EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emissions / immunity evidence, including harmonic current emissions where relevant. The EMC file should cover the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and installation environment being supplied to Fiji, including tropical humidity, coastal salt-mist exposure, surge exposure, and heat derating assumptions for island grids.
summary.zh: 斐济标准管理由Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards（DNTMS）负责，而项目业主和EFL通常依赖IEC体系技术证据审查并网电气设备。对于光伏逆变器，相关EMC文件应包括适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射/抗扰度证据，包括相关情况下的谐波电流发射。EMC文件应覆盖供应至斐济的具体逆变器型号、功率等级、固件配置和安装环境，包括热带湿度、沿海盐雾暴露、浪涌暴露和岛国电网热降额假设。
summary.zht: 斐濟標準管理由Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards（DNTMS）負責，而項目業主和EFL通常依賴IEC體系技術證據審查併網電氣設備。對於光伏逆變器，相關EMC文件應包括適用於光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射/抗擾度證據，包括相關情況下的諧波電流發射。EMC文件應覆蓋供應至斐濟的具體逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體配置和安裝環境，包括熱帶濕度、沿海鹽霧暴露、浪湧暴露和島國電網熱降額假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and related test methods
Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS) standards administration
Energy Fiji Limited project and grid-connection technical review

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. Although Chinese standards may reference IEC 61000-family methods, GB/T 37408 EMC files are not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 project package for Fiji. They also may not document operation under Fiji's 240/415 V grid, coastal surge exposure, salt-mist environment, or project-specific cable and earthing configuration.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内测试方法，由CNAS认可实验室出具。虽然中国标准可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC文件不会自动等同于斐济项目所需的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000文件包，也可能未记录斐济240/415 V电网、沿海浪涌暴露、盐雾环境或项目特定电缆和接地配置下的运行。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內測試方法，由CNAS認可實驗室出具。雖然中國標準可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC文件不會自動等同於斐濟項目所需的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000文件包，也可能未記錄斐濟240/415 V電網、沿海浪湧暴露、鹽霧環境或項目特定電纜和接地配置下的運行。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports for China market PV inverters

gap.en: Gap: China domestic EMC evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for Fiji project review. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, EFL engineer, lender, or EPC requires ILAC-accredited IEC reports, and whether harmonics or immunity results need to be rechecked at 240/415 V, 50 Hz. For coastal and cyclone-exposed projects, EMC and surge-protection documentation should be paired with installation evidence for earthing, lightning protection, enclosure integrity, and salt-mist corrosion resistance.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内EMC证据应补充IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000系列报告，以供斐济项目审查。出口商应确认买方、EFL工程师、融资方或EPC是否要求ILAC认可的IEC报告，以及谐波或抗扰度结果是否需要在240/415 V、50 Hz条件下复核。对于沿海和气旋暴露项目，EMC和浪涌保护文件还应配套接地、防雷、外壳完整性和盐雾耐腐蚀安装证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內EMC證據應補充IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000系列報告，以供斐濟項目審查。出口商應確認買方、EFL工程師、融資方或EPC是否要求ILAC認可的IEC報告，以及諧波或抗擾度結果是否需要在240/415 V、50 Hz條件下覆核。對於沿海和氣旋暴露項目，EMC和浪湧保護文件還應配套接地、防雷、外殼完整性和鹽霧耐腐蝕安裝證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required in practice for EFL, EPC, lender, or owner technical review of grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence supports China domestic voluntary certification and procurement but does not automatically transfer to Fiji IEC-aligned project review

source.publisher: Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS), Fiji

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T 37408 EMC reports as supporting evidence, not as a complete Fiji EMC file. Confirm IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series report expectations with the Fiji buyer, EFL reviewer, EPC, or lender, and check whether the 240/415 V grid profile, coastal surge exposure, and salt-mist environment require additional project evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告视为支持性证据，而非完整斐济EMC文件。请与斐济买方、EFL审查方、EPC或融资方确认IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列报告要求，并检查240/415 V电网配置、沿海浪涌暴露和盐雾环境是否需要额外项目证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告視為支持性證據，而非完整斐濟EMC文件。請與斐濟買方、EFL審查方、EPC或融資方確認IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列報告要求，並檢查240/415 V電網配置、沿海浪湧暴露和鹽霧環境是否需要額外項目證據。
